creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you for your submission.

Please do not use REINPLACE_CMD for static replacements.  Instead, supply a patch file in FILESDIR.  You can use "make makepatch" to generate these, see the Porter's Handbook for details.

PORTREVISION should be removed when updating to a new version.  I think setting to 0 is okay though.

Please check and resubmit.
